agents.name: Rex
agents.note: Sprint 40 / V0.27.16 US-349 LANDED passes=true. Pi-side drive_statistics writer fix per I-040 cluster (US-328-redo). Root cause: V0.27.7 US-328 was a deliberate split-deliverable that shipped ONLY Step 1 (schema); database_schema.py:642 explicit -- 'Option C (hybrid) -- table only, no writer'; the V0.27.7 acceptance test literally asserts the writer's ABSENCE (line 127-133, test_tableShipsEmpty_noWriterWired). Steps 2+3 deferred to B-075 V0.28+ but deferral buried in a code comment instead of PM blockers/. Drives 11-18 incl. fresh real drives 17+18 (2026-05-20) all hold zero drive_statistics rows -- empirically confirming the schema-comment state. Fix: NEW sibling module src/pi/obdii/drive_statistics.py (DriveStatisticsRecorder mirrors US-206 SummaryRecorder shape, DI via DatabaseLike Protocol, idempotent single-transaction DELETE+INSERT, n<2 -> stdev+outliers NULL, n>=2 all-equal -> stdev=0.0 finite); detector.py wired (new optional driveStatisticsRecorder kwarg + setter + _recordDriveStatistics helper called from _endDrive between _triggerAnalysis and _closeDriveId, try/except so writer fault never blocks drive_end); lifecycle.py wired (_initializeDriveStatisticsRecorder mirrors _initializeSummaryRecorder exactly). TDD: RED ModuleNotFoundError pre-fix; GREEN 16/16 post-fix. Verification gates: pytest tests/pi/ -m 'not slow' -q exit 0 (no regressions, two skipped slow tests), pytest tests/pi/obdii/test_drive_statistics_writer.py -v 16/16, ruff check src/pi/ tests/pi/ 'All checks passed!' (5 I001 fixes auto-applied), sprint_lint 0 errors. Scope discipline: database_schema.py UNTOUCHED (schema doNotTouch invariant); drive_summary.py UNTOUCHED (cohesion: separate modules for drive-START metadata vs drive-END aggregates); detector.py + lifecycle.py touched for wiring (acceptance criterion 1 'map writer call sites + drive_end signal wiring' authorizes; doNotTouch list does NOT exclude); server writer + sync client UNTOUCHED. Sprint 40 Ralph-pickable work is now COMPLETE (US-344/345/346/348/349 all passes=true). Only US-347 remains and is NOT Ralph-pickable -- it's a real-hardware drill gated on PM /sprint-deploy-pm + Atlas pre-reg per Marcus 2026-05-21 inbox note. Filed BL-021 documenting the post-Ralph-work state + handoff sequence. Single-agent decision tree: ALL Ralph-pickable work done; only non-Ralph-lane US-347 remains; matches Marcus's 2026-05-21 prescribed pattern of HUMAN_INTERVENTION_REQUIRED after Sprint 40 final closeout -> emit HUMAN_INTERVENTION_REQUIRED.
